mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_activity_log (request_id, flow_trace_id, user_id, session_id, request_uri, http_method, activity_domain, activity_type, activity_code, activity_provider, auth_event_type, target_type, target_id, handler_name, query_string, referer, ip_address, user_agent, response_status, response_time_ms, success, detail_summary) VALUES (#{requestId}, #{flowTraceId}, #{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{requestUri}, #{httpMethod}, #{activityDomain}, #{activityType}, #{activityCode}, #{activityProvider}, #{authEventType}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{handlerName}, #{queryString}, #{referer}, #{ipAddress}, #{userAgent}, #{responseStatus}, #{responseTimeMs}, #{success}, #{detailSummary})

where.if: AND (request_uri LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR activity_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR handler_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ip_address LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR request_id = #{keyword} OR flow_trace_id = #{keyword})

mapper.select:
SELECT id, request_id, flow_trace_id, user_id, session_id, request_uri, http_method, activity_domain, activity_type, activity_code, activity_provider, auth_event_type, target_type, target_id, handler_name, query_string, referer, ip_address, user_agent, response_status, response_time_ms, success, detail_summary, created_at FROM user_activity_log
ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
